steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank completes the phrase "genetic research only recently ______ its ancestor to be the wild Johnny gourd." The subject is genetic research; the object is the ancestor. The blank needs a verb meaning identified or determined — a word for discovering what something is.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — revealed: "research revealed X to be Y" is the standard idiom for scientific discovery of identity. ✓
  • Choice B — petitioned: means to formally request something; research cannot petition an ancestor. ✗
  • Choice C — expanded: means to grow or enlarge; it describes physical change, not identification. ✗
  • Choice D — encouraged: means to support or motivate; unrelated to discovering ancestry. ✗
A is correct.
